name: seo-auto-optimizer
description: Daily SEO Auto-Optimization Loop – scans, analyzes, optimises, and auto-publishes SEO improvements via GitHub Actions.

scripts.scan: node src/scan/gsc.js && node src/scan/technical.js && node src/scan/broken-links.js
scripts.analyze: node src/analyze/ranking-delta.js && node src/analyze/content-gap.js && node src/analyze/priority.js
scripts.optimize: node src/optimize/meta-rewriter.js && node src/optimize/internal-linker.js && node src/optimize/blog-generator.js
scripts.full-run: npm run scan && npm run analyze && npm run optimize && npm run publish
